migrations.title: Seed .groundwork/config/config.toml
migrations.summary: Installs the user-owned config file on installs that predate it. init seeds it once; update never touched it, so older installs have none.

migrations.title: Register the Serena code-intelligence MCP server
migrations.summary: Adds the Serena MCP server to .mcp.json and removes the retired depwire server. Idempotent; only the depwire entry is removed, other servers are untouched.

migrations.title: Remove the orphaned .agents/groundwork/skills/ tree
migrations.summary: Hidden methodology skills moved to .groundwork/skills/ so no agent skill scanner can pick them up. update installs the new tree; this deletes the old .agents/groundwork/skills/ location. Promoted engineer skills under .agents/skills/ are untouched.

migrations.title: Remove orphaned bet test-manifest.json seal files
migrations.summary: The SHA-256 test-manifest seal was removed (./dev bet sign is gone; ./dev test bet no longer verifies a manifest). The dev-bundle update drops the bet sign command; this deletes the now-inert .groundwork/bets/<slug>/test-manifest.json files. decomposition.json and other bet artifacts are untouched.

migrations.title: Rewrite npx groundwork invocations to npx groundwork-method
migrations.summary: The package publishes as groundwork-method (the bare npm name is taken); project scripts and CI invoking `npx groundwork` resolve to the wrong package.

migrations.title: Rename docs/ux-design.md to docs/design-system.md
migrations.summary: The UX Design phase became the Design System phase; projects carrying the old document need the rename and its cross-references carried forward.

migrations.title: Retire hexagonal-architecture.md for code-structure.md
migrations.summary: The structural-design principle was reframed away from the hexagonal label to How We Structure Code; installs carrying the orphaned hexagonal-architecture.md need it removed and its live cross-references carried forward to code-structure.md.

migrations.title: Bootstrap the surface registry and capability ledger
migrations.summary: Products set up before the multi-surface restructure have no docs/surfaces.md / .groundwork/surfaces.json; bootstrap them via groundwork-surface-activation.

migrations.title: Stamp drift-tracking frontmatter on code-coupled docs
migrations.summary: Docs written before drift tracking lack last_reviewed / source_of_truth frontmatter, so groundwork check cannot assess them.

migrations.title: Uplift in-flight bets to the current bet shape
migrations.summary: Bets opened before the bet-loop restructure lack decomposition.json and current pitch frontmatter; uplift in-flight bets, leave shipped ones alone.

migrations.title: Register surfaces and native sidecars as ./dev runners
migrations.summary: Projects scaffolded before the runner registry have a runner-less dev.config.json, so their Electron/CLI/Flutter surfaces and native sidecars are invisible to ./dev; register them without touching db/jaeger compose.

migrations.title: Project the atmosphere token layer into existing Next.js apps
migrations.summary: Next.js apps scaffolded before the per-app token projection carry a hardcoded globals.css and no brand.css, so the design system's atmosphere (elevation, blur, gradients, surface treatments, motion, type-role micro) cannot reach the UI and the token-conformance gate is absent; regenerate the token layer from brand-tokens.json, reconcile any hand-edited globals.css, and add the conformance test.

migrations.title: Graduate in-doc Summary for Downstream sections out of docs/
migrations.summary: The cross-phase Summary for Downstream contract moved out of published docs/ into a temporary .groundwork/context/ store torn down at setup completion. Projects predating the change carry a stale summary section atop each setup doc; graduate each summary's binding decisions into docs/decisions/ ADRs or the doc body, then strip the section, leaving docs/ as clean reference documentation.

migrations.title: Retire the machine-readable bet artifacts for the prose model
migrations.summary: The bet is now pure prose: decomposition.md became a docs/bets/<slug>/decomposition/ tree, decomposition.json is dropped (the suite + git are the record), docs/bets/<slug>/contracts/ is removed (the prose design carries shapes; the canonical contract is captured into docs/api/<service>/ from running code), and the approval baseline is the git tag bet/<slug>/approved. Largely advisory: prints the model change and names active bets to restructure by hand; mechanically removes obsolete decomposition.json/contracts/ from archived (delivered) bets and stray .groundwork/bets/<slug>/decomposition.json.
